top_signals.title: Oil jumps to $98 after Houthis attack two Saudi Arabian oil tankers
top_signals.summary: Yemeni rebels say they used missiles and drones to target the vessels Encelia and Layla
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Alphabet and Tesla test Wall Street's patience as AI spending overshadows growth
top_signals.summary: Shares of Alphabet and Tesla dipped after the companies reported massive spending increases in their quarterly earnings reports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
